description: Native multi-file open picker for `cs upload`. Granted to locally-served SPA windows (workspace-*, terminal-*, control-terminal-* connect-script terminals, local::<window_id> watcher-opened workspace windows) and loopback devserver windows (lib-*). Authenticated exact gateway origins receive the equivalent permission through a runtime capability. Excludes outbound-* remote URL attachments because this command opens a native picker and reads the selected local files.
